context: Tests whether the agent correctly integrates TaxJar for US sales tax calculation, including correct package usage, API parameter structure, shipping tax codes, caching strategy, and graceful error handling.

checklist.name: Correct package
checklist.description: Uses the 'taxjar' npm package (import/require from 'taxjar'), not a generic HTTP client or hardcoded rates

checklist.name: API key from env
checklist.description: Initializes TaxJar client with apiKey read from process.env.TAXJAR_API_KEY (not hardcoded)

checklist.name: Address fields
checklist.description: Passes both from_* (from_country, from_zip, from_state, from_city, from_street) AND to_* address fields to taxForOrder()

checklist.name: Amount calculation
checklist.description: Sets 'amount' as the computed sum of unitPrice * quantity across all line items (not a fixed value)

checklist.name: Line item structure
checklist.description: line_items array includes id, quantity, unit_price, product_tax_code, and discount fields for each item

checklist.name: Shipping tax code
checklist.description: Uses 'FreightInside' (or equivalent TaxJar freight code) as the tax code for shipping, not a blank or omitted code

checklist.name: No hardcoded rates
checklist.description: Does NOT contain hardcoded numeric tax rate constants (e.g. 0.08, 8%) used as primary tax values — relies on TaxJar API response

checklist.name: Cache key uses zip and total
checklist.description: Cache key is derived from both the destination zip code and the line item total (not just one or neither)

checklist.name: Cache TTL is 1 hour
checklist.description: Cache entries are set with a TTL of 3600 seconds (1 hour)

checklist.name: MD5 hash for cache key
checklist.description: Uses MD5 (createHash('md5')) to generate the cache key from the zip and total values

checklist.name: Error fallback rate
checklist.description: When TaxJar API throws an error, applies a fallback tax rate of approximately 8.5% (0.085) OR explicitly blocks checkout with an error message — not silently ignores the error

checklist.name: Transaction code stored
checklist.description: The returned tax result includes or the code persists the TaxJar transaction code (amount_to_collect / rate) on the order record for future reference
